name: Matthew Witt
text: Thanks for being awesome!!! Pooja provided us a 5 star experience throughout the entire process of purchasing our first home. She was patient and thoughtful during the house search providing honest feedback along the way. She helped us put in a competitive offer and strategized with us through the negotiation process. It never felt like we were pressured because she made us feel like she just wanted the best for us. We will be recommending her to other friends in need of a realtor.
